underlying_goal: Get server hardening recommendations and apply a specific change (disable X11Forwarding in sshd_config)
friction_detail: Claude lacked sudo permissions to edit /etc/ssh/sshd_config and had to instruct the user to run the command manually, which apparently did not execute successfully.
brief_summary: User asked for server config recommendations and wanted X11Forwarding disabled; got good advice and explanation but the actual change required manual sudo execution that didn't complete during the session.
